title: Automating Task Dependencies in Monday.com: Auto-Update Status and Start Dates
excerpt: How can I automate task dependencies in Monday.com, so that when one task is marked as complete, dependent tasks automatically update their status or start dates?

posts.author: nulls1122 (Nullsbrawlapk)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I automate task dependencies in Monday.com, so that when one task is marked as complete, dependent tasks automatically update their status or start dates?
